tabs.tab_title: Evente looks great  -  what is it?
tabs.accordion_content: Evente is a virtual space where you and your remote team can work and hang out together. Evente makes spending time with your remote team fun & productive.

tabs.tab_title: Is my data secure with Tell Desk?
tabs.accordion_content: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade encryption, role-based access, and regular security audits to ensure your data is always protected. Tell Desk is also GDPR-compliant.

tabs.tab_title: How does the pricing model work?
tabs.accordion_content: Tell Desk offers a flexible subscription model. You can choose between monthly or annual billing, with different plans tailored for startups, growing businesses, and enterprises. Custom pricing is also available for larger teams.

tabs.tab_title: Can my team collaborate on Tell Desk in real-time?
tabs.accordion_content: Yes! Multiple users can collaborate in real-time, track progress, and assign tasks. You’ll always have visibility into who is working on what, without messy back-and-forth emails.

tabs.tab_title: What kind of support does Tell Desk provide?
tabs.accordion_content: We offer 24/7 email support, live chat during business hours, and a knowledge base with step-by-step guides. Premium plans include dedicated account managers.

tabs.tab_title: Can I try Tell Desk before purchasing?
tabs.accordion_content: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all features—no credit card required. This way, you can explore Tell Desk and see if it’s the right fit for your team

tabs.tab_title: How do I get started with Tell Desk?
tabs.accordion_content: Getting started is simple. Sign up on our website, customize your workspace, and invite your team. Our onboarding wizard will guide you through the setup in under 10 minutes.
